retry_reason: If ctx is NULL, retrying with the same input still fails; if non-NULL, kref_put always succeeds, so no retry is needed.
contract_summary: Put wrapper that releases a reference on the amdgpu_ctx object via kref_put, triggering amdgpu_ctx_do_release when the last reference is dropped. The function safely handles NULL input by returning -EINVAL. After this call, the caller must no longer use the context unless it holds another reference. This is the standard release operation paired with a corresponding amdgpu_ctx_get.
